name: Serpstat
tagline: All-in-one SEO platform at a fraction of Semrush's price
description: Serpstat is an all-in-one SEO and PPC platform offering keyword research, backlink analysis, site audits, rank tracking, and competitor analysis. It covers 230+ countries and provides a large keyword database at a significantly lower price point than Semrush or Ahrefs, making it popular with freelancers and growing agencies.
pros: Very affordable compared to Semrush and Ahrefs
cons: Data accuracy not always as strong as top-tier tools
